summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HevaPOS 3 new features: Table selection in POS, Restaurant user management by Platform Owner, and Kitchen receipt ESC/POS generation. All 41 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.

integration_issues.issue: printerService.isConnected is not a function - non-critical, PDF fallback works correctly

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix printerService.isConnected function in /app/frontend/src/services/printer.js (non-critical - PDF fallback works)
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during testing, some cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features working correctly: 1) Table selector in POS cart area with status badges (Free/Occupied), 2) Platform Owner can manage restaurant users via Manage Users dialog, 3) Kitchen receipt ESC/POS commands generated after order placement with PDF fallback.
